---
title: "recorder.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\live\recorder.ts"
loc: 16
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.63
style_score: 9.33
intel_score: 9.50
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `recorder.ts` module manages the live persistence of agent activity. It records heartbeats (pings) and detailed mission traces directly into 'Mimir's Well' (SQLite), providing a high-fidelity chronological ledger of all autonomous operations.

## Interaction Protocol
Use the `recordPing` and `recordTrace` functions to log agent events in real-time. These functions ensure that telemetry is persisted and available for the HUD and visualization layers.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [AgentPing](file://../types.ts)
- [savePing](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [saveTrace](file://../intel/database.ts)

### Exports
- `recordPing`
- `recordPing`
- `recordTrace`
- `recordTrace`
